source_of_truth_order: StatusSnapshot v1 from Public YonerAI or AWS staging runtime evidence
status-healthcheck input from YonerAI API, AWS, manual, or scheduler

snapshot.purpose: Public-safe canonical staging/preview snapshot from AWS/Public YonerAI runtime evidence.

healthcheck.purpose: Input from YonerAI API, AWS metric values, static/manual states, and scheduled jobs.

monitor.purpose: Normalized internal monitor result after checks are evaluated.

source.purpose: Compact editable source with sparse day overrides and public incident data.

feed.purpose: Only final public input consumed by the browser renderer.

aws_metrics.purpose: Public-safe numeric AWS metric summary produced outside the status page.

yonerai_health.purpose: Public-safe YonerAI component health summary produced outside the status page.

all_inputs_to_feed.promotion_policy: validate feed schema and public feed safety before promotion unless --skip-validate is used

status_input_to_public_feed.input: snapshot, healthcheck, monitor, or source input

promote_public_feed.promotion_policy: validate feed schema and public feed safety, backup existing file, then atomic replace

sync_public_feed.input: healthcheck, monitor, source, aws metrics, or YonerAI health summary
sync_public_feed.sync_policy: auto-detect input schema, fill when needed, build pipeline, validate public safety, promote public feed

build_public_package.package_policy: copy only public runtime files and validated public feed

restore_public_feed.restore_policy: validate backup feed schema and public feed safety, backup current file, then atomic replace

public_files_forbidden: raw monitor results containing private internal URLs
pipeline reports containing local absolute paths

runtime_update_contract.snapshot_policy: yonerai.status.v1 must be converted before browser rendering

uiux_invariants: Do not edit status DOM directly from integrations.
Do not add a second tooltip or second detail panel.
Do not preserve selected highlights when the selected route no longer exists.
Do not break mobile touch tooltip behavior.
Do not double-fire bar cascade animation.
Do not change UI/CSS while modifying bridge code unless explicitly scoped.
claim_rules: not_started means preparation or not connected, not failure.
alpha_only means alpha-only availability, not production operation.
operational can only be shown for a component/day when real or intentionally mocked feed data says so.
Do not claim production availability before live monitoring is connected.
Display-test/mock feeds must visibly identify themselves as display-test/mock data.
